🍪 We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site performance. By continuing, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.
Privacy Policy
Effective: December 31, 2025 · Last updated: December 31, 2025

1. Who We Are

Braxley Institute ("we", "our", "us") is an international online business education institution founded on December 31, 2025. We are committed to protecting your personal data and processing it in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

Contact: braxleyinstitute@gmail.com | braxleyinstitute@gmail.com

2. Data We Collect

  • Identity data: First name, last name, middle name, date of birth
  • Contact data: Email address, country of residence
  • Application data: Programme selection, uploaded identity documents
  • Payment data: Transaction reference numbers, payment method (we do not store card numbers — payments processed by Kaspi.kz)
  • Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, session tokens

3. How We Use Your Data

  • Processing your admission application and communicating decisions
  • Sending transactional emails (account creation, payment confirmation, admission letters)
  • Verifying your identity and age (minimum 14 years)
  • Improving our platform and services
  • Complying with legal obligations

4. Legal Basis for Processing

We process your data based on: (a) performance of a contract (your application); (b) your consent where required; (c) legitimate interests in providing education services.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell your data. We may share data with: email service providers (Gmail/SMTP), cloud hosting providers (Railway), and as required by law. All processors are bound by data processing agreements.

6. Data Retention

Application and account data is retained for 5 years after your last interaction with us. You may request deletion at any time (see Section 8).

7. International Transfers

As an international institution, your data may be stored on servers located outside your country. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for all transfers.

8. Your Rights

  • Access: Request a copy of your personal data
  • Rectification: Correct inaccurate data
  • Erasure: Request deletion of your data
  • Portability: Receive your data in a machine-readable format
  • Objection: Object to processing based on legitimate interests

To exercise any right, email braxleyinstitute@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

9. Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL/TLS encryption, bcrypt password hashing, JWT authentication, and regular security reviews. No system is 100% secure; we encourage strong passwords.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy. Material changes will be notified via email. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

Terms & Conditions
Effective: December 31, 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the Braxley Institute platform ("Platform"), you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 14 years of age to register. By registering, you confirm that you meet this requirement and that all information provided is accurate and truthful.

3. Application Process

  • Each student may submit one application per admission cycle
  • A non-refundable application fee of 3,000 KZT is required to activate academic review
  • Submission of false or misleading information will result in immediate disqualification
  • The Admissions Committee's decision is final

4. Payments

The application fee of 3,000 KZT is processed via Kaspi.kz. This fee covers administrative processing and is non-refundable regardless of the admissions decision. Braxley Institute is not responsible for delays caused by the payment provider.

5. Intellectual Property

All content on the Platform including text, graphics, logos, and course materials is the property of Braxley Institute. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without written permission.

6. Acceptable Use

  • You may not use the Platform for unlawful purposes
  • You may not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Platform
  • You may not impersonate other users or staff
  • You may not submit offensive, harmful, or misleading content

7. Limitation of Liability

Braxley Institute is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in application fees.

8. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan. Disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Kazakhstan.

9. Contact

Questions about these Terms: braxleyinstitute@gmail.com

Cookie Policy
Effective: December 31, 2025

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. We use localStorage (similar to cookies) to remember your session and preferences.

What We Store

  • braxley_token — Your authentication token (expires in 7 days)
  • braxley_user — Basic profile information to display your name
  • braxley_cookies — Your cookie consent preference

Essential Storage (Always Active)

Authentication tokens are required for you to use your account. These cannot be disabled without logging out.

Analytics

We do not currently use third-party analytics or tracking cookies. We may add privacy-respecting analytics in the future with appropriate notice.

Managing Your Preferences

You can clear all stored data by logging out or clearing your browser's local storage. This will sign you out of your account.

📢 Send Announcement

This message will appear in the notification bell of all students.

Our Story

From GL Business School
to global online institute

Braxley Institute was founded on December 31, 2025 — an evolution of GL Business School into a fully digital, internationally-oriented institution of higher education.

Our mission: remove every geographic barrier between ambitious learners and world-class business education. Rigorous programmes, real project work, and a global peer community.

Every module is built around practical outcomes — not memorisation, but mastery you can apply immediately.

🔒 Security & Trust

SSL-secured platform · Public Offer Agreement · Privacy Policy · Full Terms & Conditions for all enrolled students.
Contact: braxleyinstitute@gmail.com · Telegram: @Paybusbraxley

Academic Programmes

Three pathways to
professional mastery

From foundational knowledge to executive leadership. Choose the programme that fits your ambition.

Admissions Process

A clear, transparent
path to acceptance

Four steps. Three business days. One transformational decision.

01
📝
Apply
Create your account and fill in your application form completely.
02
💳
Pay
Pay the 3,000 ₸ fee via Kaspi to +7 705 617 93 09 or via Telegram @Paybusbraxley.
03
🔍
Review
Our academic committee reviews your application within 3 business days.
04
🎓
Decision
Receive your official admissions letter and access to the student portal.
